title: Google Just Dropped The Singularity Bomb
summary: Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis claims humanity may be entering the foothills of the singularity as AI agents now handle coding, research, and science. The video argues that the question has shifted from AI perfection to whether imperfect but useful AI is already accelerating productivity across domains.
